content.en:
After Ye Tian broke out of the encirclement, he did not stop there, but continued to look for the Eternal Tribulation Clan.

Once he is surrounded, he immediately rushes out of the encirclement and absolutely does not love to fight.

At this moment, he roughly figured out the strength of this Eternal Tribulation Domain, which was not very strong.

Moreover, this Eternal Tribulation Domain has already been discovered, and if the entrance is stable, the next group of Supreme Beings will enter here.

Even if the entrance was gone, those powerful Eightfold and Ninefold Beings could completely tear out an entrance and let the Triple Supreme enter here.

At that time, the Eternal Tribulation Clan of this Eternal Tribulation Domain will not be able to stop it at all, and this Eternal Tribulation Domain will definitely be destroyed.

Therefore, he wants to take advantage of this opportunity to get more benefits.

As time passed, more and more Supreme beings poured into the area, and the Eternal Tribulation Clan fell into disadvantage completely.

this day.

A large group of Eternal Tribulation Clans arranged a large array to tear apart an exit and leave this Eternal Tribulation Domain.

They knew very well that if they didn't leave, they would be wiped out by the powerful people in the outside world.

After all, the Eternal Tribulation Clan is mortal enemies with those Exotic Heavens and Regions and the creatures that grew up in the Eternal Heaven and Earth, and some special beings in the Source Sea will not deliberately target them, but some special beings in the Source Sea also want the Eternal Tribulation Crystals on their bodies.

I have to say that the Eternal Tribulation is simply a moving treasure trove, and everyone wants to take a bite.

Bang!!!

The Eternal Tribulation succeeded in tearing a gap, and a large number of Eternal Tribulation rushed out.

There are tens of thousands of Eternal Tribulation Clans here, and they are all the Eternal Tribulation Clans left in this Eternal Tribulation Domain.

......

Source Sea.

The Eternal Tribulation rushed out and was soon discovered.

A large number of Supreme Beings launched a hunt for the Eternal Tribulation Clan, and Ye Tian also came out of the Eternal Tribulation Domain at this time.

Just as he was about to follow the other Supreme Beings as they prepared to pursue this group of Eternal Tribulations, the mutation came.

"How dare you attack our clan and seek death!"

A giant black hand covering a large area of the Source Sea Territory tore through the Source Sea Void and grabbed it.

The Source Sea is extremely stable, and it can tear apart the Source Sea Void, which shows how terrifying the opponent's strength is.

As soon as those three or four supreme beings collided with this black giant claw, the eternal body could not bear it, and they shattered one after another, turning into corpses.

Then, countless black rays of light pierced through the void and blasted towards a supreme being.

Many supreme beings couldn't resist these black lights at all, and they were shot and killed one by one.

And although Ye Tian was far away, for such a strong person, this distance was nothing at all, so there was also a black light that locked on him, and it hit him with a blow.

Ye Tian did his best to perform a supreme skill of defense and turned into layers of light masks.

The black light pierced through layers of light covers, and was finally resisted by Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body, but it was still injured.

The power of this blow was enough to bombard the Fivefold Supreme, if it weren't for the fact that his Endless Eternal Body fused with the Ancient Star Eternal Body, his life-saving ability was too strong, otherwise he wouldn't be able to withstand the attack of the black light.

"This mysterious powerhouse should also be an Eternal Tribulation Clan, and his strength is definitely above the Eightfold Primary, and it may even be the Ninefold Peerless!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Bang!!!!

A powerful Supreme One appeared, instantly stopping the Eternal Tribulation powerhouse, and the two sides fought.

But after only a few moves, the Eternal Tribulation Clan powerhouse wrapped the rest of the Eternal Tribulation Clan and disappeared, obviously not daring to delay time, otherwise he would not be able to escape if he was surrounded by multiple powerhouses.

The surviving Supreme Beings were glad one by one, but there were really a lot of Supreme Beings who fell this time.

"An unorganized invasion of the Eternal Tribulation Domain is still too dangerous!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Eternal Tribulation Clan of this Eternal Tribulation Domain is indeed not strong, but the Eternal Tribulation Clan has strong people, once a strong person is contacted to help, the Triple Supreme or even the Fourth or Fifth Supreme are all ants.

If it was the Ninefold Supreme Being, he could easily take down a low-level Eternal Tribulation Domain.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tian immediately left, away from this area, and then returned to the Void Source Hall.

After coming back, Ye Tian took out those Eternal Tribulation Crystals.

"182 Eternal Tribulation Crystals, the harvest is not bad!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Even if it is an Eternal Tribulation Crystal, the value is very high, not to mention that there are so many Eternal Tribulation Crystals, but most of these Eternal Tribulation Crystals come from the Eternal Tribulation Clan with the strength of a supreme being, so the grade is not too high, and the value is not as high as the Eternal Tribulation Crystal of the Eternal Tribulation Clan.

But for Ye Tian, so many Eternal Tribulation Crystals were enough to make his Endless Eternal Body a little better.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to retreat to absorb and refine the Eternal Tribulation Crystal.

The energy contained in the Eternal Tribulation Crystal was huge, so it would take a long time to completely absorb and refine the Eternal Tribulation Crystal, but Ye Tian's Eternal Ancestor Tribulation could play a role, increasing his absorption and refining speed by tens of thousands of times.

Therefore, in just 10,000 years, Ye Tian could completely refine an Eternal Tribulation Crystal.

As the energy of the Eternal Tribulation Crystal poured into the body, the Endless Eternal Body seemed to be a seed that had absorbed nutrients and was thriving, something that had never been seen before.

The Endless Eternal Body is improving, and Ye Tian's strength is also improving.

However, the boost from an Eternal Hedron is not significant.

So, Ye Tian continued to refine the Eternal Tribulation Crystal.

Gradually, one by one, the Eternal Tribulation Crystals were absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, and Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body was also growing rapidly.

More than 10 million years later, Ye Tian had completely refined all the Eternal Tribulation Crystals, and his strength was much stronger than in the past.

"It's a pity that I still haven't stepped into the level of Xiaocheng Eternal!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Maybe if it were someone else, the eternal body would have been small a long time ago, and if it was an ordinary eternal body, maybe it would have been completed or even consummated.

However, his Endless Eternal Body was too powerful, so he had only been promoted to the late stage of entry, and he had not even reached the peak of entry.

However, just by raising it to this level, it is easy to beat other people's median eternals.

---------------

The Ancient Realm of the Stars.

Xingzu was already 100% sure that Xu Chen had betrayed him and betrayed the Gu Xing Clan at this moment, and at the same time, he was also ready for a showdown.

"Dawn!"

Star Ancestor roared.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared and came to the Ancient Star Tower.

"Ancestor, what's the matter?"

Ye Tian pretended not to know anything and asked.

Xingzu was very angry, holding back the anger in his heart, and asked, "Xu Chen, don't you want to release me?"
